member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ActivitiesController
member.summary: Activities management endpoints

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ActivitiesController.GetActivities
member.summary: Get all available activities
member.returns: Alphabetically sorted list of all activities

member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.AiController
member.summary: AI-powered features for park exploration and recommendations

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.AiController.GenerateParkSummary(System.Int32)
member.summary: Generate an AI-powered summary for a specific park
member.returns: A concise, engaging summary of the park

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.AiController.GetRecommendations(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.RecommendationRequest)
member.summary: Get personalized park recommendations based on preferences
member.param: Recommendation preferences including activities, region, and description
member.returns: List of recommended parks with match scores and reasons

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.AiController.Chat(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.ChatRequest)
member.summary: Chat with an AI assistant about Ontario parks
member.param: Chat message and optional conversation history

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.AiController.PlanVisit(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.VisitPlanRequest)
member.summary: Generate a personalized visit plan for a park
member.param: Visit planning parameters including park, duration, interests, and season
member.returns: Day-by-day visit plan with activities and tips

member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ParksController
member.summary: Parks management endpoints

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ParksController.GetParks(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get paginated list of parks
member.returns: Paginated list of parks ordered by featured status then name

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ParksController.GetParkById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get detailed information about a specific park
member.returns: Park details including all activities and images

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ParksController.SearchParks(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Search parks by name or description
member.param: Search query (searches park name and description)

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Controllers.ParksController.FilterByActivities(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Filter parks by activities
member.returns: Paginated list of parks matching activity criteria

member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService
member.summary: AI service providing park summaries, recommendations, chat, and visit planning. Implements caching and optimized context injection for token efficiency.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService.GenerateParkSummaryAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Data.Entities.Park)
member.summary: Generates an AI-powered summary for a park. Results are cached for 24 hours.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService.GetRecommendationsAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.RecommendationRequest)
member.summary: Gets personalized park recommendations based on user preferences.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService.ChatAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.ChatRequest)
member.summary: Handles chat interactions about Ontario parks with context-aware responses. Only loads minimal, relevant park data to optimize token usage.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService.BuildMinimalParkContextAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Builds minimal park context based on the user's question to optimize token usage.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.AiService.PlanVisitAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.VisitPlanRequest)
member.summary: Creates a personalized visit plan for a specific park.

member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.IAiService
member.summary: Service interface for AI-powered park features including summaries, recommendations, chat, and visit planning.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.IAiService.GenerateParkSummaryAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Data.Entities.Park)
member.summary: Generates an AI-powered summary for a park highlighting key features and activities. Results are cached for 24 hours to improve performance.
member.returns: A 2-3 sentence engaging summary, or a fallback message if AI is unavailable

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.IAiService.GetRecommendationsAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.RecommendationRequest)
member.summary: Gets personalized park recommendations based on user preferences.
member.param: User preferences including activities, region, and additional criteria
member.returns: A list of up to 5 recommended parks with match scores and reasons

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.IAiService.ChatAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.ChatRequest)
member.summary: Handles conversational chat about Ontario parks with context-aware responses. Optimizes token usage by loading only relevant park data based on the question.
member.param: Chat request containing the user message and optional conversation history
member.returns: AI-generated response to the user's question

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.IAiService.PlanVisitAsync(OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Models.DTOs.AI.VisitPlanRequest)
member.summary: Creates a personalized multi-day visit itinerary for a specific park.
member.param: Visit plan request containing park ID, duration, interests, and season
member.returns: Day-by-day itinerary with activities and practical tips

member.name: T:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.Prompts.PromptTemplates
member.summary: Centralized prompt templates for AI-powered features. All templates are optimized for token efficiency and reliable output formatting.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.Prompts.PromptTemplates.ParkSummary(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generates a prompt for creating a concise, engaging park summary. Output: 2-3 sentence plain text summary.

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.Prompts.PromptTemplates.Recommendations(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a prompt for personalized park recommendations. Output: JSON with array of recommendations (parkName, reason, matchScore).

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.Prompts.PromptTemplates.Chat(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a prompt for the Q and A chatbot feature. Output: Plain text response to user's question.
member.param: Relevant park data (should be pre-filtered and concise)

member.name: M:OntarioParksExplorer.Api.Services.AI.Prompts.PromptTemplates.VisitPlan(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Generates a prompt for creating personalized visit itineraries. Output: JSON with days array and tips array.
member.param: Number of days for the visit (1-14)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
